reviews.review_title: Cant log in, register or go in as guest
reviews.review_description: Cant even get into the game or even the menu screen, let alone play it, keeps on loading, everytime i try to register, log-in or hell even go into guest mode, it just loads and never lets me play, im pretty sure those buttons dont even work at all, i even let my headset on becaude i thought i wasn't patient enough, i let it on for an HOUR and it was still loading! Hell i even have the best internet connection and yet cant still cant make an account or play into guest mode. You dont know how much i want to swear right now in this review.
for some reason, i cant get in

At first when I started this game I did the tutorial and it was pretty good but the movement needs some work but since it's a early release game I wouldn't expect it to be perfect hoping the fix that in the future over all great game would recommend👍🎮

The games fun graphics are great and it’s totally worth playing with friends but make it so that vr players can also be the fighters so that you don’t have to only play with pc players just vr players i would really like to not have to wait and hope a pc player gets on and plays with me

This game ducks already for one I need a account which I tried doing but then It didn't stop loading the I left and rejoined the game and my email was now an account so I try to play as a guest also doesn't work

I went out and bought a metaquest after I saw this game and it delivered!!!
You get to fight real PC players in game 🔥 
10/10 a must try.
I needed the tutorial, but I got good at the game quickly.
Few games in the Quest Store successfully blend VR and PC PvP gameplay in an engaging and fun way. Boss Fighters excels at this, delivering a seamless and thrilling cross-platform experience.
Game looks amazing on VR and if you need help go check out their discord and the community will help you!

reviews.review_title: The most fun VR vs PC game ever!
reviews.review_description:
I love everything about this game. The concept is refreshing, the gameplay is smooth and engaging and graphics are hilarious.

It needs some polishing and ironing out of some bugs to make this the best VR game on Quest.
